description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository and defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables with typical batch‑mode and TLS settings. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. In the build stage add a validate:jdk7 job using the maven:3.3.9-jdk-7 image and a validate:jdk8 job using the maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 image, each executing the command "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test-compile". In the test stage add verify:jdk7 and verify:jdk8 jobs (same images) that run "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify site site:stage" and are excluded from the master branch, plus a deploy:jdk8 job using maven:3.3.9-jdk-8 that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy site site:stage", runs only on the master branch, and stores the target/staging directory as an artifact. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job using busybox:latest that depends on deploy:jdk8, runs "mv target/staging public", publishes the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and also runs only on the master branch.
